props.name: keyboardIconVisibility
props.description: Controls visibility of the keyboard navigation indicator icon. Use "visible" to show or "hidden" to hide.

props.name: keyboardNav
props.description: Navigation mode. "table" navigates like a table (up/down between rows), "layout" allows wrapping between rows with left/right arrows.

props.name: keyboardIconPosition
props.description: Position of the keyboard navigation indicator icon.
